creator: JuliusO@sympatico.ca
text:
During fresh install of i386 FreeBSD 4.2 off of a CD created from the ISO file downloaded from ftp.freebsd.org, and trying to pick WindowMaker as the X desktop, you get an error message saying that it isn't there. Subsequent comparison of 4.1.1 and 4.2 CDs shows that the WindowMaker tgz file is indeed no longer there.

Fix: 

Fiddle faddle around and download missing file off of ftp.freebsd.org
How-To-Repeat: Start with a fresh clean system, no OS install. Do standard install and pick WindowMaker as the X desktop. See error message.
